name: regex_search
description: Search by regex on file path or file content. Returns a single string in result (newline-separated). path_only=true searches file paths; otherwise searches file contents and returns matched lines with numbers.

path_only.description: If true, search file path and return matched file names; if false, search file contents and return matched lines.

max_entries.description: Maximum returned entries for both modes. Use 0 for unlimited.
